Runed Blade  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 26 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Rune III (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 46
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Aug 03 2022 at 2:26 PM Rating: Decent

1 post
Confirmed to drop, August, 2022

I'd guess about 200 kills of Knight of Sathir before it finally became mine again! :-) Used to have one on Luclin back in the day.
▲ Page top
Still drops
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2023 at 3:42 AM Rating: Decent
Ikkysar
Scholar
73 posts
I started this camp on Oakwynd when Velious released, and camped it solo rather heavily for about 6 weeks before it finally dropped. 75 Knight of Sathir kills to get my runed blade (and what felt like at least 10x more in PHs). By the time I was done with this camp, I finished the kill 1000 iksar achievement, and only half the camp is iksar, the other half is sarnak.

Just some tips from what I learned:

Seems like chance to spawn is between 5-20%. Every mob adjacent to the big VSR room has a chance to spawn it (4 rooms downstairs, 1 upstairs). Multiple can be up at once (my record was 3).

Only way out from downstairs is a locked door. Helps to have either bind affinity, succor, or lockpicks so you can clear both upstairs and downstairs without getting stuck downstairs, but if you can't clear down stairs, camping the room up stairs will suffice to get the knight to spawn reliably (there is one mob down stairs that you can hit from upstairs for a total of 4 PHs). If you go down stairs to kill a KoS, you can fear him and he will run through the locked door and summon you through it giving you access to upstairs again.

This is an especially safe camp since it's very insulated from the rest of the zone and mobs don't really path in a way that brings adds, even with VS up (just don't let him see you directly). I only died while stepping away from desk mid-fight or intentionally ranger-gating.

This is a great place to fear kite as mob escape paths are predictable and safe from adds both up stairs and down stairs. You can run the mob in a circle on the ledge of the VSR room without pulling adds.

My paly solo strat at 60 was to use Anklesmasher until snare procs, then just fear kite. Using DD undead spells seemed rather inefficient mana-wise compared to mana-free melee dmg, considering you want to kill as many of these mobs as you can before having to sit and med. If you can't fear kite, chain stun with the occasional Celestial Cleansing, then fear mob when it gets to 15% and it will be too slow to get very far.

The mob that is looking in to VS room can be pulled solo by just sitting peaking at it. If you attack it it will pull the mob across from it in the room (VS does not assist).

VS room mobs can all spawn KoS, but you can't directly pull this room with VS up unless you have FD.

If you decide to just camp the top room and get in to trouble, you can root a mob on the hall next to the room door, then run around the corner to the door at the entrance to the hall, and the mob rooted next to the door will immediately drop aggro. A weird glitch, but saved me quite a few times when I realized I wasn't going to win the fight (even works on KoS). I believe it has something to do with line of sight or the fact there is an overhang in the path.

If you're a pet class you can type /target spectral (or skeletal, or knight) to target mobs downstairs and pull them upstairs with pet.

If pulling both top and bottom areas, make a macro to see if KoS is spawned: /target knight.

If you have a partner you can easily tag team to keep both upstairs and downstairs clear, just have someone downstairs pull to the center of VSR room and attack from range or pull to up stairs (they will jump up the ledge to get upstairs).

There might be some trickery to spawning the KoS. An 8 hour camp with a group clearing both up stairs and down stairs, the last 3 hours of which KoS stopped spawning. The only change was that we stopped keeping the upstairs room clear. It's possible that the upstairs room being cleared increases the chance that KoS spawns. Either that or someone was using eyes/hacks to nab knight remotely any time we spawned it. Cannot confirm.

Regarding the other loot from this camp: I had fun looting 150+ Blackjacks and parceling them out on the new players channel for free (drop off PHs). From KoS, Oggok Cleaver and blood ember boots dropped 10% of the time it seems (got about 6-8 drops each). The vast majority of the time KoS drops Wand of Sathir and nothing else.

Edited, Nov 11th 2023 7:20am by Ikkysar
____________________________
Claxin Milactium ~ 32 Paladin ~ Terris Thule (RIP)
Frayleaf Cloudrunner ~ 90 Bard ~ The Rathe
Intel ~ 60 Enchanter ~ Fippy Darkpaw
Phathom Sargasso ~ 60 Paladin ~ Oakwynd
▲ Page top
It still drops.
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2004 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802244740
1 post
I can indeed confirm the runed blade still drops. Hehe... very, very rare, mind you... haven't seen it in the bazaar in a number of months. But, I wanted it for my warrior... so I decided to try and go camp the Knights of Sathir in and around the VS room. After a long camp... 8 minutes short of 12 hours, I finally got it. Had camped it the night before and earlier that day for a numbers of hours as well. Can barely wait to use it on my warrior now..
▲ Page top
reagent?
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2003 at 6:08 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593966493699
178 posts
I have this on my warrior on Karana... love it and will never part with it.

Got it in Bazaar for 20k... a steal IMHO.

Well when I right click for the details box it claims it takes a reagent... was afraid they had nerfed my baby so went out to check... not a gemstone on me anywhere... it procced like always... no reagent required.

The data thing is an error... OR is a precursor for nerfage. I dunno. I think they just cut and pasted the info from the Rune III spell IMHO.

So as of late Sept 2003 no reagent required for the Rune III proc on this weapon.


Sylver

Help
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2002 at 10:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774942832
5 posts
I got the Runed Blade the other night on The Rathe Server. I havent come across hardly any info on this weapon. Im also having some difficulty getting a PC on it. Is this weapon worth using for a ranger? If not, what is a fair PC on it? I realize that each server'seconomy is different. I would appreciate any input anyone might have on this. Especially from someone who has used it. What is the value of the item?
▲ Page top
RE: Help
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 6:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758775332
Scholar
30 posts
I bought it for 22K and sold it a year later for 35K. I rarely used the thing, because it was slow and put out little damage. Sure it was nice when it proc'd Rune III, but Rune III is damage absorb 230, and when mobs are hitting at 100+, it sure doesn't last long. Usually what I'd do is kill a lowbie mob in some zone until the thing proc'd then go and fight... but then again, that's only one free set of 230hps, unless you really want to go back and do it again.

I'd have to say it is most effective from 45-50ish when the mobs hit for less... still, make sure your dexterity is high, because you want that thing to proc as much as possible.

Baron Hershiser Lilydale
56 Knight - Mixed Nuts
Cazic Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Help
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2003 at 7:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770931271
168 posts
Ha, another person that does not know what they are missing.

I have this blade. I use it now as a MA in POV. I only use it though to trim down on the mobs riposites. 1hs, mobs here riposite like theres no tomorrow. And I only use it if a Enchanter or Shaman is in the group and buffs my dex. This sword is a godsend. It proc's constantly. On average, 5 minute fight, it procs no less then 10 times. 10 x 230 = 2,300hp. That will put a warrior with 7700hp buffed to the 10k mark. 2,300hp that the cleric does not have to heal back. The only downside to this weapon, is its dmg. With 270 strength I can crack 200's with this sword with an average hit being 175. When I was below 60 and hunting in OS with a group, I went 10 rounds of mobs without taking a single hit. Mind ya there was a shaman and enchanter in group and mobs were slowed, but it was an amasing feat in itself. The most I had seen it proc in OS was 14 times off one mob. In PoV, I got tired of counting after the 20th.

Ask an enchanter of High level what happens to them when they cast a rune of any kind on an MA in group/raid. It's an instant agro buff when they do. So, when you proc this on yourself, agro comes right to you. Love this sword, highest bid I have seen was 125kp.

Adom Wraithbane
63 Warrior
Erollisi's Marr
▲ Page top
drinal
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2002 at 7:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570545244
View User Forum
6 posts
I have this sword on the drinal server and looking to sell it if anyone is interested. May even consider some high end warrior gear, send tell to gakpak.
▲ Page top
I have this
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2002 at 9:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770931271
168 posts
I have this blade. It has the same graphic as a Arbitors Combine Great Sword and as many others like it. It does proc Rune 3 and it procs real often. The proc is a 275hp damage absorbing shield it has a little more hp than the enchanters spell. In a normal fight with mobs in OS, it procs 3 to 6 times per fight depending on dex. Never seen less then 3 procs. Most I have seen on 1 mob was 11 times. I played MA on several occasions and my clerics love me. I can go 10 rounds of mobs with max dex and never get hit in OS. It does not require any reagents. It drops very, very very rare inside KC off the Knights. This is an extremely rare drop, if you did a PC in bazar noone will answer because they dont know because they never seen it. The last one I know of that dropped was over a year ago. This was about the time they said it got nerfed and no longer drops. I am on Emarr server, interested parties send tells to Adom level 60 Warrior

Wow
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 4:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759694924
1 post
I recently paid 76K for this thing (talked the guy down from 80), and I must say I would NOT sell it for double that. This thing is VERY rare- I've been playing for 2+ years and this is the only one I have come across.

But anyway, I've also got a fungi for when on the rare occasion the rune III wears off, and I have become nearly invincible. I have not been below 75% health since getting this thing. The guy I bought this from said he was selling it because he was retiring his warrior and was planning on twinking his son's druid for his birthday. If he ever decided to revive that warrior, he'll be sorry!

Hey, I'm a 49 Paladin, and I'm thinking of buying this blade for 3.5k, and I think thats a REALLY nice price... Ok well, I have a few questions...

What does this baby look like? If the look is awesome, I will definantly spend the cash.

I can get around 120dex, and as a 49 Paladin, I like to solo in Eastern Wastes as much as I can. Will this thing proc a good amount?

What would be better with the new Palaidn only 25% haste, Arbitors Combine Greatsword(I know, kepe it for wisdom purposes, but I mean for fighting), or this Runed Blade?

And, when it procs, if a spell is cast on you, does it absorb damage from the spell?


I think no matter what, I am getting this blade. It is TOTALLY uber, and I would love it for raids/main tanking, basically in any situation I would love this. Any answers to any of these questions would be greatly appreciated.
